sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65447" key="megalomoiri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλο-μοιρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n65447.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">magnificence</tr_>, Aristeas <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0008.tlg001.perseus-grc1:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope> </bibl> (dub.).</sense> </entryFree>
